ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SHAPED_GLASS.descriptio: Upon pickup, Enchant all Attacks in your Deck with [gold]Design[/gold] and lose half your Max HP.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SHAPED_GLASS.flavor: As the sharpness of the edge drives you, it also makes you brittle.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SHAPED_GLASS.title: Shaped Glass
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-STARSEED.description: Upon pickup, obtain [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Rare[/gold] card rewards. Add [red]Egocentrism[/red] to your deck.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-STARSEED.flavor: It sounds like two brothers, chasing glass frogs in the sun.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-STARSEED.title: Starseed
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SHARED_DESIGN.descripti: At the end of combat, you may remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your deck if you took no unblocked attack damage.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SHARED_DESIGN.flavor: Through flawless design, you may seek perfection.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SHARED_DESIGN.title: Shared Design
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-FLAWLESS_HAMMER.descrip: Add [blue]Break Beneath Me[/blue] to your deck.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-FLAWLESS_HAMMER.flavor: Elegant design. Heavy mass. A drop of blood. Yes, this will do perfectly.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-FLAWLESS_HAMMER.title: Flawless Hammer
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-ANCIENT_SCEPTER.descrip: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] ALL [gold]Strikes[/gold] and [gold]Defends[/gold] into [blue]Perfected[/blue] versions.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-ANCIENT_SCEPTER.flavor: The crystal pulsates with powerful energy as you pick it up.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-ANCIENT_SCEPTER.title: Ancient Scepter
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-FRACTURED_BLADE.descrip: After your first turn, take an extra turn. Whenever you play a card on your first turn, lose [blue]1[/blue] Max HP.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-FRACTURED_BLADE.flavor: A massive crack runs down the length of the blade.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-FRACTURED_BLADE.title: Fractured Blade
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-PILLAR_OF_MASS.flavor: Mass is simple. The base of all forms, shaped and molded. Take this, and create your own vision.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-PILLAR_OF_MASS.title: Pillar Of Mass
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-ARTIFACT_OF_COMMAND.des: Choose any [blue]1[/blue] non-special card to add to your deck.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-ARTIFACT_OF_COMMAND.fla: "Take a sip of the drink, and the mind becomes malleable....and the world around you follows your example." - Sigibold the Drunken
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-MONSOON_CHARM.descripti: All combats drop an additional relic. Rest Sites are replaced with Elites.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-MONSOON_CHARM.flavor: Rain pours down on your head. You feel a sense of dread as you hold it.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-MONSOON_CHARM.title: Monsoon Charm
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-EULOGY_ZERO.description: Combat relic rewards are replaced with random non-Neow [gold]Ancient[/gold] relics.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-EULOGY_ZERO.flavor: "Architect...your death is fated. When you die - and you WILL die - I will be ready. I have been patient for millennia. This Spire...is mine."
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-EULOGY_ZERO.title: Eulogy Zero
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-FLASH_BEACON.descriptio: Every [blue]4[/blue] turns, all enemies lose [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] for [blue]1[/blue] turn.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-FLASH_BEACON.flavor: "Truth be told, I hate this one. Damn thing hurts my eyes. Just..keep it pointed away, would ya?"
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-FLASH_BEACON.title: Flash Beacon
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SEBASTIANS_SCANNER.desc: Upon pickup, mark [blue]9[/blue] random combats. Rewards in those rooms include an additional relic reward.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SEBASTIANS_SCANNER.flav: "You want the scanner? What, am I not good enough at finding things for you?~ Fine, fine, but if you break it, I'll rip off your head, got it?"
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-MEDICAL_KIT.description: When you enter a [gold]Rest Site[/gold], procure a [gold]Neloprephine Shot[/gold].
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-MEDICAL_KIT.flavor: "This one's not anything special. Just contains a collection of bandages, gauze, some tools and implements, and a good amount of this miracle serum I found."
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-MEDICAL_KIT.title: Medical Kit
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-WILDLIFE_DOCUMENTS.desc: At the start of combat, apply [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Disadvantaged[/gold] to all enemies.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-WILDLIFE_DOCUMENTS.flav: "This should contain everything you need to know about all the monsters and freaks you may encounter in the Spire. Written by yours truly, of course~"
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SEBBY_CHARM.description: Choose a [gold]Power[/gold] in your deck to Enchant with [gold]Charmed[/gold].
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SEBBY_CHARM.flavor: "Fine, fine. Since you're just so fond of me for some reason, how about a little charm? Best I can do, terribly sorry~"
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SEBBY_CHARM.title: Sebby Charm
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SHOTGUN_SHELLS.descript: Add [gold]Triple Barrel Shotgun[/gold] to your deck.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SHOTGUN_SHELLS.flavor: "Ahh, definitely one of my favorite inventions from the gizmo makers back in R&D. Just be sure to bring it back in one piece, yeah?"
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SHOTGUN_SHELLS.title: Shotgun Shells
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SHIPPING_REQUEST.descri: Obtain [gold]Heavy Crate[/gold]. Add [red]Weighed Down[/red] to your deck. The crate contains gold, [blue]2[/blue] potions, [blue]4[/blue] relics, [blue]3[/blue] card rewards, [blue]1[/blue] rare card reward, and [blue]1[/blue] card removal.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SHIPPING_REQUEST.flavor: "The big crate? Yeah, you can have it, and whatever's inside. You'll have to head on up to get the key, though, I dropped the damn thing and I'm pretty sure the big guy at the top of this layer has it."
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SHIPPING_REQUEST.title: Shipping Request
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-GLOWING_VIAL.descriptio: You may [gold]Mutate[/gold] at Rest Sites as a free action.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-GLOWING_VIAL.flavor: "Hey, be careful with this one now, it's pretty potent. You might feel one or two of your bones breaking. That means it's working!"
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-GLOWING_VIAL.title: Glowing Vial
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SALINE_INFUSER.flavor: "Ooh, I love this thing! Adds a nice salty taste to anything you drink. Might even be able to bring out a little extra life in those potions you're fond of..."
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SALINE_INFUSER.title: Saline Infuser
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-EXPERIMENTAL_SERUM.desc: Upon pickup, obtain an [gold]Ancient Card[/gold]. (hovertip is fucked rn ask pyro i sent a list)
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-EXPERIMENTAL_SERUM.flav: "Can't say I recommend the serum. It's horribly painful, no matter how rewarding the results may be."
